changedFiles.reason: Defined Project Governance scope and acceptance.
Recorded implementation evidence and residual risks.
Regenerated Work Item lifecycle status.
Documented Doctor, calibration, confirmation, Guard validation, and readiness.
Registered system invariant and project calibration Check IDs.
Added machine-readable product consistency SSOT.
Added the confirmed repository Project Profile SSOT.
Added Project Governance targets and quality gates.
Added the calibrated adoption flow and invariant marker.
Added the equivalent Japanese calibrated adoption flow.
Added the equivalent Chinese calibrated adoption flow.
Documented Profile lifecycle, trust boundaries, and readiness conditions.
Implemented strict Project Profile schema and approval validation.
Implemented read-only evidence/confidence project scanning.
Implemented non-overwriting calibration proposal generation and validation.
Implemented fail-closed Profile/Guard consistency checks.
Implemented release, docs, stack, CI, target, Check ID, link, and capability invariants.
Required approved Profile, Guard consistency, quality, Coverage review, and CI wiring.
Extended the small YAML parser with explicit empty-list support.
Added per-file coverage floors for five new governance scripts.
Distributed new runtime scripts while preserving project-owned Profiles across install and upgrade.
Exposed Doctor, calibration, Profile, and Guard targets to installed projects.
Covered fixtures, schema separation, calibration conflicts, Guard drift, and system drift.
Added the complete public-entrypoint black-box lifecycle and rollback journey.
Updated readiness tests for Profile and dual CI requirements.
Verified install and upgrade preserve Profile and proposal files.
Verified Project Governance Make targets are public.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Doctor is read-only and reports evidence and confidence without approval claims.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Doctor tests compare filesystem state and validate evidence/confidence for Flutter, Spring Boot, and Python/AI fixtures.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Calibration never overwrites Guards or promotes unconfirmed suggestions into blocking policy.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Calibration refuses proposal overwrite and leaves approvedBoundaries empty with approval false.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: project_profile.yaml is the project boundary SSOT and unknowns remain explicit.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Strict schema separates detectedFacts, suggestedBoundaries, approvedBoundaries, unknowns, evidence, and approval; blocking unknowns fail confirmation.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Use only Python standard library and existing small-YAML parsing conventions.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: All new runtime scripts use the standard library and the shared small YAML parser.

risk.detail: A new governance layer affects installation, readiness, Guard semantics, documentation, and lifecycle validation.

observedIssues: Public v0.5.0 distribution remains valid but does not contain the new Project Governance runtime.
Project Profile approval is a repository record, not trusted identity or a security proof.

residualRisks.detail: Do not advertise Project Governance as publicly delivered until a new immutable release passes distribution checks.
Doctor signals are evidence-backed heuristics and intentionally leave uncommon architectures as unknowns.

reviewReadiness.reason: All local automation and black-box journeys pass; public delivery requires a new release tag.
expectedReviewFocus: Profile and Guard overlap or ordering
Rules or fields that can be removed

boundaryChecks.runtimeEntrypoints: verified: public Make targets and install.sh black-box journey
boundaryChecks.userVisibleOutput: verified: Doctor JSON, proposed Profile, validation errors, and three-language flow
boundaryChecks.persistence: verified: confirmed Profile is project-owned and upgrade-preserved
boundaryChecks.localization: verified: machine-identical governance flow markers in English, Japanese, and Chinese
boundaryChecks.generatedArtifacts: verified: Doctor report under target and non-overwriting proposed Profile
boundaryChecks.makeEntrypoints: verified: Doctor, calibration, Profile, Guard, readiness, quality, lifecycle, and PR targets

checkpointEvidence.detail: Architecture, scope, trust boundaries, and non-goals confirmed before implementation.
Quality, journey, release distribution, shell, invariants, Profile, and Guard checks passed.

knownGaps: A new immutable release and hosted CI run are required before public Project Governance delivery.
overclaimPrevention: Do not report completion for checks or behavior that were not verified.
